subject: A massive red-skinned giant shaman swinging a heavy sledgehammer or maul downward to shatter stone, kicking up debris and dust
description: A hulking giant shaman with deep red skin dominates the frame, hooded and obscured beneath a tattered crimson cloak so that the face reads as shadow. The figure swings a massive two-handed hammer or maul downward, mid-impact, splitting stone tile or pavement that fractures with the Boros and Gruul iconography of Ravnica beneath. Red and ochre dust kicks up from the strike point, with chunks of broken masonry tumbling. The composition is a tight mid-shot, leaning into the destructive motion. Background is a hot, smoky orange-red haze with hints of ruined urban geometry, grounding the scene as a Ravnican street being demolished.
foreground: giant shaman swinging hammer, shattered stone tiles, dust plume
background: smoky orange-red haze, broken urban masonry
